summary: Tested iteration 57 feature: Strike/rayage functionality for grouped expenses. All features working correctly - Admin can check items to strike with reason selection, total recalculates in real-time, struck items are hidden from print output.
critical_code_review_comments: AchatsTab.jsx lines 64-117: strikeEdits state and handlers correctly manage struck/strike_reason/strike_note per item
AchatsTab.jsx lines 744-840: Strike checkboxes correctly render ONLY for Admin role (isAdmin check)
AchatsTab.jsx lines 777-786: Checkbox uses Shadcn Checkbox component with red border styling
AchatsTab.jsx lines 805-828: Strike reason select with 4 options (Pas opportun, À reporter, À abandonner, Autres) + free text for 'Autres'
AchatsTab.jsx lines 834-841: Real-time total recalculation showing 'X ligne(s) rayée(s) — total recalculé' message
AchatsTab.jsx lines 973-984: Approved view shows '📦 Liste (X articles)' with non-struck count + admin-only '🚫 X ligne(s) rayée(s)' badge
CaissePage.jsx lines 1739-1761: printAllApprovedExpenses correctly filters struck items using keptItems() and expenseAmount()
CaissePage.jsx lines 1909-1914: printApprovedExpensesDetailed correctly filters struck items with visibleItems filter
Backend expenses.py lines 318-331: PUT /api/expenses correctly recalculates amount excluding struck items on approval

success_rate.backend: 100% (API correctly recalculates amount excluding struck items)

seed_data_creation: Created test expense 'TEST_Liste courses iter57' with 3 items (30000 F total). Approved with 1 struck item (TEST_Tomates fraîches, 5000 F). Final amount: 27000 F. Test data cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 added strike/rayage functionality for grouped expenses. Admin can check items to strike with reason selection (Pas opportun, À reporter, À abandonner, Autres). When 'Autres' is selected, a free text field appears. Struck items show with line-through, red background, and reduced opacity. Total recalculates in real-time excluding struck items. On approval, backend recalculates amount. In approved view, badge shows non-struck item count. Admin sees '🚫 X ligne(s) rayée(s)' badge. Print functions (A4 and Détail par achat) completely hide struck items and their reasons.

frontend: Strike checkboxes appear ONLY for Admin role on pending grouped expenses - VERIFIED
Strike checkboxes do NOT appear for Manager (Gérante) role - VERIFIED
Checking checkbox shows strike reason dropdown with 4 options - VERIFIED
Selecting 'Autres' shows free text input field - VERIFIED
Struck line shows with line-through, red background, reduced opacity - VERIFIED
Total recalculates in real-time excluding struck items - VERIFIED
'X ligne(s) rayée(s) — total recalculé' message appears when items struck - VERIFIED
Approuver button sends struck flags to backend - VERIFIED
Approved view shows '📦 Liste (X articles)' with non-struck count - VERIFIED
Admin sees '🚫 X ligne(s) rayée(s) (masquée(s) à l'impression)' badge - VERIFIED
Print A4 hides struck items completely - VERIFIED
Print Détail par achat hides struck items completely - VERIFIED
Print shows correct article count (non-struck only) - VERIFIED
backend: PUT /api/expenses with status=approved recalculates amount excluding struck items - VERIFIED
Struck items saved with struck=true and strike_reason - VERIFIED
